documentation.file_docstring: Transcribes the first audio attachment BEFORE mention checking. This allows voice notes to be processed in group chats with requireMention: true. Returns the transcript or undefined if transcription fails or no audio is found.
inline_comments: Check if audio transcription is enabled in config
Mark this attachment as transcribed to avoid double-processing
Log but don't throw - let the message proceed with text-only mention check

functions.name: transcribeFirstAudio
functions.doc: Transcribes the first audio attachment BEFORE mention checking.   This allows voice notes to be processed in group chats
